primary.stack: pretendard, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', 'Segoe UI', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', 'Noto Sans KR', 'Malgun Gothic', 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', sans-serif

rationale: Wadiz runs Pretendard exclusively — no display secondary face. The mark of a Korean fintech-adjacent product post-2022: Toss/Banksalad/Kakao-Bank all consolidated on Pretendard for Korean+Latin coverage with weight axis. 400 (393x) carries body, 700 (358x) carries pricing/funding amounts and headings, 500 (109x) is for medium-emphasis labels.
